---
name: Documentation task
description: Improve or add README, guides, API docs, or config comments
title: "[docs] "
labels: [documentation]
---

## Scope

What should be documented or updated? (e.g. `README`, `docs/`, module docstrings, `configs/*.yaml` comments, contributing guide.)

## Audience

Who is this for? (new contributors, researchers, operators running pipelines, etc.)

## Current gap

What is missing, wrong, or unclear today? Link to files or sections if possible.

## Proposed content

Outline the changes: new sections, rewrites, diagrams, or examples. Paste draft text if you already have it.

## Relations to code

Does this require code changes, or is it documentation-only? If the behavior is wrong in code, link or open a bug report.

## Checklist (author)

- [ ] Terminology matches the project (non-clinical scope for risk/safety where applicable).
- [ ] No secrets, private paths, or non-redacted credentials in examples.

## Additional context

Optional: style guide notes, related issues, or links to external specifications.
